payload.request_text: Quero as 20 maiores vendas dos ultimos 30 dias por regiao, com ticket medio e variacao percentual versus mes anterior.
payload.generated_sql:
WITH recent_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(SALE_DATE, DAY) AS sale_date, 
    REGIONS.region AS region, 
    SUM(SALE_AMOUNT) AS total_sales, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT SALES_ID) AS num_sales, 
    AVG(SALE_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY REGIONS.region) AS avg_ticket
  FROM `seu-projeto-gcp.finance_dw.sales` 
  WHERE SALE_DATE >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
previous_month_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(SALE_DATE, MONTH) AS sale_date, 
    REGIONS.region AS region, 
    SUM(SALE_AMOUNT) AS total_sales, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT SALES_ID) AS num_sales, 
    AVG(SALE_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY REGIONS.region) AS avg_ticket
  FROM `seu-projeto-gcp.finance_dw.sales` 
  WHERE SALE_DATE >= DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 31 DAY, MONTH) AND SALE_DATE < DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), MONTH)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT 
  rs.region, 
  rs.sale_date AS recent_sale_date, 
  rs.total_sales AS recent_total_sales, 
  pm.total_sales AS previous_month_total_sales, 
  rs.avg_ticket AS recent_avg_ticket, 
  pm.avg_ticket AS previous_month_avg_ticket, 
  ((rs.total_sales - pm.total_sales) / pm.total_sales) * 100 AS sales_variation_percentage
FROM recent_sales rs
JOIN previous_month_sales pm ON rs.region = pm.region AND DATE_TRUNC(rs.sale_date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(pm.sale_date, MONTH)
ORDER BY rs.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 20
payload.explanation: A query utiliza duas CTEs (Common Table Expressions) para calcular as vendas recentes e do mês anterior. Em seguida, une as duas CTEs para calcular a variação percentual e seleciona as 20 regiões com maiores vendas recentes.
assumptions: A tabela `finance_dw.sales` contém os campos `SALE_DATE`, `SALE_AMOUNT`, `SALES_ID` e `REGIONS.region`. A coluna `SALE_DATE` é do tipo DATE. A coluna `SALES_ID` é única para cada venda. A coluna `REGIONS.region` contém o nome da região da venda.
warnings: A query assume que o mês anterior é calculado corretamente com base na data atual. Se a data atual estiver em um dia do mês, o mês anterior será calculado corretamente. Se a data atual estiver em um dia do mês, o mês anterior será calculado corretamente.
